normal_mode.selection_reason: Port-local model is not selected because sample_count below min_total_samples; training_days below min_training_days; label missing ratio above threshold; H1 valid labels below threshold; H2 valid labels below threshold; H3 valid labels below threshold; H4 valid labels below threshold. KHWD realtime data is available, so port_local_postprocess is preferred over nearby CWA historical model.

no_realtime_khwd_mode.selection_reason: KHWD realtime unavailable; nearby CWA historical model accepted and all selected stations are closer than 467441.
